communicative_purpose: To refer to the main headline or front page of a newspaper
trigger_situations: News discussions, headline references, media coverage
variations: la une, la première page, en une, la une du journal
common_mistakes: Missing article - 'la une' not 'une'; 'en une' means on the front page
collocates: du journal, de ce matin, ce matin, faire la une
example_1: L'affaire est à la une de tous les journaux ce matin.
example_2: Le journal fait la une avec la crise économique.
example_3: La une du Figaro titre sur les elections.
example_1_translation: The case is on the front page of all the newspapers this morning.
example_2_translation: The newspaper makes the front page with the economic crisis.
example_3_translation: The front page of Le Figaro headlines the elections.

communicative_purpose: To express being subscribed to a service or channel
variations: je suis abonné, je suis abonnée, je me suis abonné, je me suis abonnée
collocates: à, depuis, à la chaîne, au service
example_1: Je suis abonné à leur chaîne YouTube depuis deux ans.
example_2: Tu es abonné à Netflix ? On pourrait partager le compte.
example_3: Je me suis abonné à la newsletter pour recevoir les nouvelles.
example_1_translation: I have subscribed to their YouTube channel for two years.
example_2_translation: Are you a Netflix subscriber? We could share the account.
example_3_translation: I subscribed to the newsletter to receive the news.

communicative_purpose: To announce that an article or content is published online
trigger_situations: Publishing articles, content release, online news
contexts: Journalism, blogs, websites, news, online media
variations: l'article est en ligne, c'est en ligne, publié en ligne, disponible en ligne
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'offline'; 'en ligne' means accessible online
example_1: L'article sur le climate change est en ligne depuis ce matin.
example_2: Mon nouvel article est en ligne sur le blog, allez le lire !
example_3: L'enquête complète est en ligne sur le site du journal.
example_1_translation: The article on climate change has been online since this morning.
example_2_translation: My new article is online on the blog, go read it!
example_3_translation: The full investigation is online on the newspaper's website.

communicative_purpose: To refer to urgent or breaking news
trigger_situations: Breaking news situations, urgent reports, live updates
contexts: News channels, journalism, social media, urgent events
variations: la breaking news, la nouvelle, le flash info, l'alerte info
common_mistakes: English 'breaking news' very common in French media; French alternatives exist
collocates: ce soir, maintenant, urgente, en direct
example_1: La breaking news tombe : le président a annoncé sa démission.
example_2: On a une breaking news à confirmer, restez branchés.
example_3: Les réseaux sociaux diffusent la breaking news en ce moment.
example_1_translation: The breaking news breaks: the president has announced his resignation.
example_2_translation: We have breaking news to confirm, stay tuned.
example_3_translation: Social networks are spreading breaking news right now.

communicative_purpose: To express being in contact or maintaining communication
trigger_situations: Staying in touch, keeping contact, communication maintenance
variations: je suis en contact, on est en contact, je reste en contact, en kontak
common_mistakes: Confusing with 'en contact' meaning physically in contact; 'en kontak' is verlan
example_1: Je suis en contact avec l'équipe de développeurs pour le projet.
example_2: On est en contact régulièrement via Slack.
example_3: Je reste en contact avec mes cousins malgré la distance.
example_1_translation: I am in contact with the developer team for the project.
example_2_translation: We are in contact regularly via Slack.
example_3_translation: I stay in touch with my cousins ​​despite the distance.

communicative_purpose: To announce that a podcast episode or content is available
trigger_situations: Podcast releases, new episodes, content availability
contexts: Podcasts, audio content, streaming platforms, releases
variations: le podcast est dispo, c'est dispo, disponible, c'est en ligne
common_mistakes: Contracted form 'dispo' is very common in casual French; 'disponible' is more formal
collocates: sur Spotify, maintenant, depuis, sur Apple
example_1: Le nouvel épisode du podcast est dispo ce matin sur Spotify.
example_2: Le podcast est dispo sur toutes les plateformes audio.
example_3: L'épisode est dispo depuis ce matin, j'ai pas encore écouté.
example_1_translation: The new episode of the podcast is available this morning on Spotify.
example_2_translation: The podcast is available on all audio platforms.
example_3_translation: The episode has been available since this morning, I haven't listened yet.

meaning: I'm team rest / I choose rest
communicative_purpose: To express choosing a particular option or team in a debate
trigger_situations: Choosing between options, expressing preferences, taking sides
contexts: Work-life balance, vacation planning, comfort preferences
variations: je suis team repos, team sommeil, team café, team week-end
common_mistakes: English expression used in French; can be confused with sports teams
example_1: Pour ce week-end, je suis team repos total, j'ai besoin de décompresser.
example_2: Team repos ou team sortie ? Je suis team repos ce soir.
example_3: Je suis team sommeil, j'ai vraiment besoin de 10 heures cette semaine.
example_1_translation: For this weekend, I'm on total rest, I need to unwind.
example_2_translation: Team rest or team outing? I'm on team rest this evening.
example_3_translation: I'm team sleep, I really need 10 hours this week.

communicative_purpose: To announce that a new episode or content has been released
trigger_situations: Episode releases, new content drops, platform updates
contexts: TV shows, podcasts, series, streaming platforms, content releases
variations: l'épisode est droppé, le nouvel épisode, c'est droppé, released
common_mistakes: English 'drop' very common in French streaming culture; 'sorti' is French alternative
collocates: ce matin, maintenant, aujourd'hui, hier soir
example_1: Le nouvel épisode de la série est droppé ce matin sur Netflix.
example_2: L'épisode 5 est droppé hier soir, je vais binge watcher ce soir.
example_3: Le podcast a droppé son episode de la semaine, à écouter maintenant.
example_1_translation: The new episode of the series dropped this morning on Netflix.
example_2_translation: Episode 5 dropped last night, I'm going to binge watch it tonight.
example_3_translation: The podcast has dropped its episode of the week, listen to it now.

communicative_purpose: To indicate that a live stream or broadcast was not functioning
trigger_situations: Technical problems, stream failures, broadcasting issues
contexts: Twitch, streaming, live events, technical issues
variations: c'était off, le direct était HS, en offline, ça marchait pas
common_mistakes: English 'offline' increasingly used; 'HS' (hors service) is French slang
collocates: ce matin, pendant, à cause de, le stream
example_1: Le direct était off pendant 30 minutes à cause d'un problème technique.
example_2: Le streamer a apologized, le direct était off au début.
example_3: Le match était en direct mais le signal était off pendant le deuxième set.
example_1_translation: The live was off for 30 minutes due to a technical problem.
example_2_translation: The streamer apologized, the live was off at the start.
example_3_translation: The match was live but the signal was off during the second set.

communicative_purpose: To express following someone's social media account
trigger_situations: Social media discussions, following accounts, online presence
variations: je suis follower, je follow, je suis abonné, je suis following
common_mistakes: English term used in French; 'abonné' is correct French for 'follower'
example_1: Je suis follower de cette chaîne YouTube depuis trois ans.
example_2: Tu es follower de qui sur Insta pour les recommendations de voyage ?
example_3: Elle a 20k followers maintenant, elle est devenue known.
example_1_translation: I have been a follower of this YouTube channel for three years.
example_2_translation: Who do you follow on Insta for travel recommendations?
example_3_translation: She has 20k followers now, she has become famous.

communicative_purpose: To refer to the main story or headline on the front page
trigger_situations: News reporting, headline discussions, media importance
contexts: Newspapers, news websites, journalism, media coverage
variations: la une, la première page, le titre principal, la manchette
common_mistakes: 'Manchette' is specifically French term for newspaper headline
collocates: ce matin, aujourd'hui, cette semaine, fait la une
example_1: La une du journal de ce matin parle de la crise sanitaire.
example_2: Le journal fait la une avec le scandale politique.
example_3: La une du Monde titre sur les négociations de paix.
example_1_translation: The front page of this morning's newspaper talks about the health crisis.
example_2_translation: The newspaper makes the front page with the political scandal.
example_3_translation: The front page of Le Monde headlines the peace negotiations.

communicative_purpose: To indicate being in a binge-watching or consuming mode
variations: je suis en binge, je binge, je suis en mode series, mode marathon
common_mistakes: English 'binge mode' used in French streaming culture
example_1: Je suis en mode binge depuis hier, j'ai fini trois saisons.
example_2: On est en mode binge ce week-end, rien d'autre de prévu.
example_3: Elle est en binge mode pour cette nouvelle série judiciaire.
example_1_translation: I've been in binge mode since yesterday, I finished three seasons.
example_2_translation: We're in binge mode this weekend, nothing else planned.
example_3_translation: She is in binge mode for this new legal series.

trigger_situations: Breaking news moments, urgent updates, live reporting
contexts: News channels, social media, journalism, live updates
variations: le breaking est là, la breaking news, flash info, nouvelle urgente
common_mistakes: English 'breaking' very common in French TV news; French would say 'flash' or 'alerte'
collocates: maintenant, ce soir, urgente, en direct
example_1: Le breaking est là : le président vient d'annoncer sa démission !
example_2: La breaking news arrive en direct de la Maison-Blanche.
example_3: Restez branchés, le breaking est là sur cette histoire.
example_1_translation: The breaking news is here: the president has just announced his resignation!
example_2_translation: Breaking news comes live from the White House.
example_3_translation: Stay tuned, breaking is here on this story.

meaning: I'm in the thick of it / I'm busy
communicative_purpose: To express being very busy or in the middle of something
trigger_situations: Being busy, working hard, intense activity
variations: je suis dans le jus, je suis dans le jus total, je suis à fond dedans
common_mistakes: Idiomatic expression from 'jus' (juice) meaning energy/activity; origin unclear
collocates: total, en ce moment, jusqu'au cou, comme jamais
example_1: Je suis dans le jus en ce moment, je rappelle demain.
example_2: On est dans le jus du projet jusqu'au cou.
example_3: La semaine avant les fêtes, je suis toujours dans le jus.
example_1_translation: I'm in a hurry right now, I'll call back tomorrow.
example_2_translation: We are up to our necks in the juice of the project.
example_3_translation: The week before the holidays, I'm still in the juice.

communicative_purpose: To report that an influencer has made a social media post
trigger_situations: Influencer activity, social media updates, content posts
contexts: Social media, influencers, Instagram, TikTok, content creation
variations: l'influenceur a posté, l'influenceuse a publié, a fait un post, a story
common_mistakes: English 'post' used as noun and verb in French; 'publication' is French
collocates: sur Insta, une story, ce matin, quelque chose
example_1: L'influenceur mode a posté sa nouvelle collection sur Instagram.
example_2: Elle a posté une story pour annoncer son partenariat avec la marque.
example_3: L'influenceur lifestyle a posté des photos de son voyage au Japon.
example_1_translation: The fashion influencer posted her new collection on Instagram.
example_2_translation: She posted a story to announce her partnership with the brand.
example_3_translation: The lifestyle influencer posted photos from her trip to Japan.
